Disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
Disclaimer.intro: Nine2Fire shares ideas about money, systems, and financial independence. Read it as educational content, not as instructions for your personal finances.

noFinancialAdvice.title: No financial advice
noFinancialAdvice.body: Nothing on this site is financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. Nothing here creates an advisor-client relationship.

educationalOnly.title: Educational purposes only
educationalOnly.body: All content is provided for general education and discussion. It is meant to help you think more clearly, not to replace professional advice.

noGuarantees.title: No guarantees of results
noGuarantees.body: Markets move, personal situations change, and outcomes vary. Past results, examples, or projections are not promises of future performance.

personalResponsibility.title: Personal responsibility
personalResponsibility.body: You are responsible for the decisions you make with your money. Before acting on anything you read here, review your own situation and speak with a qualified professional when needed.

externalLinks.title: External links disclaimer
externalLinks.body: This site may link to third-party websites for reference or convenience. Nine2Fire does not control those sites and is not responsible for their content, accuracy, or policies.
